data.current_description: Create a new recipient. If a recipient with matching address (first_name, last_name, street, zip, city) already exists, returns the existing recipient with _reused: true.
data.summary_suggestion: Create or retrieve recipient with auto-deduplication
data.description_suggestion: Create a new recipient or retrieve an existing one if a matching address already exists. Auto-deduplication matches on first_name, last_name, street, zip, and city. Returns the recipient object with _reused: true if an existing recipient was returned, or _reused: false if newly created. Supports both 200 (existing) and 201 (created) responses.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Create recipient' doesn't convey the auto-deduplication behavior which is a key feature. Description needed clarification on response codes and the _reused flag semantics to help AI agents understand when this operation returns existing vs. new recipients.
